title: helianthemum × fabadoi
intro: Helianthemum × fabadoi, also known as rockrose, is a hybrid plant species resulting from the cross between Helianthemum nummularium and Helianthemum alpestre. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Helianthemum × fabadoi include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to soothe sore throats and calm digestive issues.
